subcodes.first_line: O Leader of the company of the righteous! From the sweetness of the meanings in thy letter was the palate of spirit and conscience rendered sweet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالار جمع ابرار از حلاوت معانی نامه شما کام جان و وجدان شیرین گردید زیرا
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
